power.disable-fast-startup.notes: Fast startup changes are usually safest when reviewed next to the broader hibernate posture.

power.hide-hibernate-option.notes: Hiding the UI option without changing the underlying hibernate state can be misleading.

power.optimize-cpu-boost.notes: Boost tuning is usually interpreted together with power throttling posture.

cleanup.disable-reserved-storage.notes: Both records touch the same feature area and should not be described as independent wins.
